# Group Golf Tours

Group Golf Tours (groupgolftours.com) is a full-service golf travel agency under Zoomaway Technologies Inc. 20+ years, 10,000+ outings. Also known as Vacations on the Green and Prestige Golf.

Phone: 888-584-8232 | customerservice@zoomaway.com
Licensed seller of travel: Nevada + Florida (ST37472)

US Destinations: Lake Tahoe, Las Vegas, Monterey/Pebble Beach, Southern California, Arizona, Bandon Oregon, Beaver Creek Colorado, Sand Hills Nebraska
International: Ireland, Scotland, Portugal, Spain, Mexico, Dominican Republic
Services: Tee times, hotels, transportation, dining, travel insurance, sightseeing, group registration, packages
Experience types: Golf buddy trips, corporate/incentive travel, international tours, custom packages
